
```{r}

# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pracma)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# PEPTIDE FILE: 22aa vs ctrl at Draxin 0 and 140
# Input columns required:
#   Draxin
#   Absorbance
#   Condition
#   Experiment
#   Replicate
# =======================

file_peptide <- "input_files/22aa_peptide.csv"
out_dir_peptide <- "output/growth_assays/22aa_peptide"
dir.create(out_dir_peptide, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

dfp_raw <- read_csv(file_peptide, show_col_types = FALSE)

required_cols_peptide <- c("Draxin", "Absorbance", "Condition", "Experiment", "Replicate")
missing_cols_peptide <- setdiff(required_cols_peptide, names(dfp_raw))

if (length(missing_cols_peptide) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Missing required columns in 22aa_peptide.csv:",
          paste(missing_cols_peptide, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

dfp <- dfp_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Replicate  = factor(Replicate),
    Draxin     = str_trim(as.character(Draxin)),
    Condition  = str_trim(as.character(Condition)),
    Absorbance = as.numeric(Absorbance)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Experiment),
    !is.na(Replicate),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Condition),
    !is.na(Absorbance)
  )

# Keep only expected levels
dfp <- dfp %>%
  filter(Draxin %in% c("0", "140"),
         Condition %in% c("ctrl", "22aa"))

# Factor ordering
dfp <- dfp %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin = factor(Draxin, levels = c("0", "140")),
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = c("ctrl", "22aa"))
  )

if (!all(c("0", "140") %in% levels(dfp$Draxin))) {
  warning("Expected Draxin levels 0 and 140 were not both present after filtering.")
}

if (!all(c("ctrl", "22aa") %in% levels(dfp$Condition))) {
  warning("Expected Condition levels ctrl and 22aa were not both present after filtering.")
}

write.csv(
  dfp,
  file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_input_cleaned.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# BASIC QC
# =======================

qc_counts <- dfp %>%
  count(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Condition)

write.csv(
  qc_counts,
  file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_qc_counts.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

qc_summary <- dfp %>%
  group_by(Draxin, Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_abs = mean(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_abs = sd(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_abs = sd_abs / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  qc_summary,
  file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_group_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}

# =======================
# PLOT
# =======================

p_peptide <- ggplot(dfp, aes(x = Draxin, y = Absorbance, color = Condition)) +
  geom_jitter(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.08, dodge.width = 0.45),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    size = 3
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.45),
    width = 0.18
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "22aa peptide effect at Draxin 0 and 140",
    x = "Draxin",
    y = "Absorbance (raw)",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir_peptide, "22aa_peptide_absorbance_plot.png"),
  p_peptide,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir_peptide, "22aa_peptide_absorbance_plot.pdf"),
  p_peptide,
  width = 6,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# MIXED MODEL
# tests:
# 1) does 22aa differ from ctrl at Draxin 0?
# 2) does 22aa differ from ctrl at Draxin 140?
# 3) is the 22aa effect different at 140 than at 0? (interaction)
# =======================

if (nrow(dfp) >= 4 &&
    dplyr::n_distinct(dfp$Draxin) >= 2 &&
    dplyr::n_distinct(dfp$Condition) >= 2) {
  
  m_peptide <- lmer(
    Absorbance ~ Draxin * Condition + (1 | Experiment),
    data = dfp
  )
  
  anova_peptide <- anova(m_peptide)
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_peptide),
    file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  
  # Estimated means for each Draxin x Condition combination
  emm_peptide <- emmeans(m_peptide, ~ Condition | Draxin)
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_peptide),
    file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_emmeans_condition_within_draxin.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # 22aa vs ctrl within each Draxin level
  cond_within_draxin <- contrast(
    emm_peptide,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(dfp$Condition) == "ctrl"),
    adjust = "holm"
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(cond_within_draxin),
    file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_22aa_vs_ctrl_within_each_draxin.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # Interaction-style test:
  # does the effect of 22aa differ between Draxin 0 and Draxin 140?
  emm_interaction <- emmeans(m_peptide, ~ Draxin * Condition)
  interaction_contrast <- contrast(
    emm_interaction,
    interaction = c("pairwise", "pairwise"),
    adjust = "holm"
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(interaction_contrast),
    file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_interaction_pairwise_contrasts.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # More direct extraction of the 22aa effect at each Draxin
  peptide_effect_by_draxin <- emmeans(m_peptide, ~ Condition | Draxin)
  peptide_effect_diff <- pairs(peptide_effect_by_draxin, adjust = "holm")
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(peptide_effect_diff),
    file.path(out_dir_peptide, "peptide_condition_pairs_by_draxin.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
} else {
  message("Skipping peptide mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```
